1853730.name: RPG Maker MZ - Rinobers Futuristic Characters
1853730.description:
Welcome to the future with the Futuristic Characters pack by Rinober! Lots of fun new characters dressed for the future and ready to give life to your games!

Features:

* 5 Female, 6 Male characters and 1 Robot
* Each one comes with spritesheets, facesets and full body art
* Compatible with RPG Maker MV/MZ

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
1853730.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
